title: Order No. 1 of 2015 on VoIP Blocking and Fair Usage Policy
summary: Requires refraining from blocking or degrading voice over IP traffic, applying additional charges and amending fair usage policy.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.ott_digit: Emergency order against blocking or degrading VoIP traffic.

notes: Related instruments: Telecommunications Law and TRA orders archive Sourced from an official index listing; confirm against the instrument text.
